data.body:
E4 GENERALIZATION RESULTS (non-DSO: 11 rebar + 8 snap tickets, Sonnet single-turn + agentic slice). 

(item E) parse hardening: 126/126 chunk calls status=ok, zero crashes.

(GENERALIZATION — key finding) Single-turn Pass-1-ONLY reviewer OVER-FIRES on the held-out population: G5 FAIL 87% (13/15 tickets), E6 100% (8/8), E1 80%, T7 67%, E5 64%, T4/T5e/E2 ~53%, T9 45%. The agentic A/B shows verification CORRECTS many of these false-fails: e249 E4 ST=FAIL->AGENT=PASS, G6 AMBIGUOUS->PASS, G1G2 AMBIGUOUS->PASS (agent grounded in real rebar code). 05ac (delete-bash-dispatcher, mid-migration) legitimately stays AMBIGUOUS. => unverified Pass-1 severity is the over-fire source; this is the empirical case for the THREE-PASS standard (find -> independent verify -> deterministic decide).

(item A — E5 retune) v6 fired on 11/11 tickets (8 FAIL,3 AMB); v7 retuned fired on 9/11 (7 FAIL). Two snap tasks correctly flipped FAIL->PASS (8ce0,e46e); the retune reduced over-fire but didn't eliminate it — three-pass verification is the real fix.

(item B/E3 — overlay-trigger precision) DECISIVE: deterministic triggers over-fire vs LLM router. T11(migration) det fires 2 (5fd2,6d7b — both 'migration'=bash->py strangler, NOT data!) / llm 0 -> the predicted false-fire trap, CONFIRMED. T12(rollout) det 7 / llm 0. T8 det 13 / llm 4. => T10/T11/T12 must be LLM-ROUTED not deterministic (v7 descriptor said T10 deterministic — WRONG, fix). 

(lever A/B) decisiveness lever: recall 23/24->24/24; G6 GOOD AMBIGUOUS:3->PASS:3 (lever fixes G6 clean-hedge w/o tools); COH/E5/T11/T12/A1 perfect both systems (COH needs no AGENT tier — confirms keeping it 1-TURN); T9 still hedges clean (defensible, terse plan).

NEXT (user request): incorporate the THREE-PASS review standard (epic comment + epic 9da1): Pass1 records {finding,criteria[],evidence[],scenarios[],impact} NO severity/confidence; Pass2 separate verifier {severity attrs + binary verdict:yes/no/insufficient + evidence_span}; Pass3 deterministic decide (cited-ref veto + graded binary fraction -> confidence; block vs advisory per-criterion thresholds). Then re-run final gate through three-pass.
